title: Marbi to leave Knysna council
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Deputy mayor Alberto Marbi...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Deputy mayor Alberto Marbi announced today, Wednesday 12 March that he will be resigning from the Knysna council on Monday.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Deputy mayor Alberto Marbi announced today, Wednesday 12 March that he will be resigning from the Knysna council on Monday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Marbi, of the Plaaslike Besorgde Inwoners (PBI) party, part of Knysna's ruling ANC/EFF/PA/PBI coalition, said he had “future endeavours" to follow politically.","html":"Marbi, of the Plaaslike Besorgde Inwoners (PBI) party, part of Knysna's ruling ANC/EFF/PA/PBI coalition, said he had “future endeavours" to follow politically."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“I will pronounce on this soon,” he said.","html":"“I will pronounce on this soon,” he said."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The election of a new deputy mayor would be undertaken by the council on a date to “be determined by council or the (ruling) coalition”, said Marbi."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mark Willemse","html":"Mark Willemse"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mark Willemse of the Knysna Independent Movement (KIM) has been appointed chairperson of the council’s Municipal Public Accounts Committee.","html":"Mark Willemse of the Knysna Independent Movement (KIM) has been appointed chairperson of the council’s Municipal Public Accounts Committee."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
